review_summary: This unit supports conceptual reinforcement on why language matters for cognition and how modern neural NLP broadened from translation and answer engines to foundation models.

qa_outputs.qa_rationale: The item is aligned, grounded, and does not need repair after the prior cleanup pass.
The item is aligned, grounded, and does not need repair after the prior cleanup pass.

repaired_question_bank.question: Why is language described as more than just a tool for external communication?
choices: It can scaffold planning and higher-level thought, not only communication with others.
It eliminates the need for memory or perception in intelligent behavior.
It is useful only because it provides fixed formal meanings for every word.
It matters mainly because written language is older than spoken language.
repaired_question_bank.explanation: Language can support internal reasoning as well as social exchange. It helps people organize plans, explanations, and abstract thoughts that go beyond immediate perception.

repaired_question_bank.question: What is the main idea behind calling modern systems “foundation models” rather than only “language models”?
choices: The same large-scale modeling ideas can extend beyond text to modalities such as images, sound, and biological signals.
They are rule-based systems designed only for dictionary lookup and grammar checking.
They are small task-specific classifiers trained separately for each label set.
They avoid neural networks and rely on hand-built symbolic resources.
repaired_question_bank.explanation: Foundation models generalize the large-model paradigm across different kinds of data. The key idea is not only text generation, but broad representation and generation across modalities.

item_calibration_bootstrap.calibration_rationale: "Why is language described as more than just a tool for external communication" is a direct reinforcement check and should be on the easier side.
"What is the main idea behind calling modern systems “foundation models” rather than only “language models”" asks for applied understanding rather than pure recall, so a medium prior fits.

item_phase_map.phase_rationale: "Why is language described as more than just a tool for external communication" works best as an early concept check.
"What is the main idea behind calling modern systems “foundation models” rather than only “language models”" is better after the learner already has the basic vocabulary.
